steps.title: Reconcile the findings
steps.content: Rao and Chen found that liberalization did not produce enduring increases in investment. Grant found that investment increased significantly in the three years after liberalization. Together, the findings point to a short-term increase that does not last.

steps.title: Avoid unsupported conclusions
steps.content: B mentions economists' expectations, which the passage never gives. C reverses Grant's timing by suggesting benefits begin only after three years. D makes a comparison with non-liberalized countries that is not discussed. The answer is A.
